text.source_text: स्यादेतत् — कार्यस्य चेत्कारणाधीनत्वमम्बरान्तधृतिरभ्युपगम्यते , प्रधानकारणवादिनोऽपीयमुपपद्यते । कथमम्बरान्तधृतेर्ब्रह्मत्वप्रतिपत्तिरिति ? अत उत्तरं पठति —
text.transliteration_iast: syādetat — kāryasya cetkāraṇādhīnatvamambarāntadhṛtirabhyupagamyate , pradhānakāraṇavādino'pīyamupapadyate | kathamambarāntadhṛterbrahmatvapratipattiriti ? ata uttaraṃ paṭhati —

translation.literal_translation: One may object: if sustaining up to space just means an effect depends on its cause, then even for those who hold Pradhana as cause this could fit. How then is Brahman-hood inferred merely from sustaining up to space? To this, the next answer is read.
translation.technical_translation: Purvapaksha transition: causal-dependence alone is claimed insufficiently discriminative, preparing stricter exclusion criteria.
translation.interpretive_note: Bridge objection introducing next decisive filter.

lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Tracks each block inside the section-level inferential sequence

uncertainty_notes: Curated in contiguous S03 pass with stable S04-style schema semantics.
A later philological pass should tighten technical terms in the akshara and pranava subsections.
